headlines.title: U.S. military launches new Iran strikes as Trump says 'not sure' he wants deal
headlines.summary: Centcom said it launched dozens of strikes on Iranian military infrastructure and small boats; Trump said the U.S. might take more military action "tonight."

headlines.title: SpaceX stock closes below debut price at $148 in two-day slide after Nasdaq-100 inclusion
headlines.summary: SpaceX's record IPO raised a total of $85.7 billion after underwriters exercised the "greenshoe" overallotment.

headlines.title: McConnell health update demanded by Gov. Beshear as Senate vacancy questions grow
headlines.summary: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to a hospital on June 14.

headlines.title: Trump announces long-shot bid to get Supreme Court to rehear birthright citizenship case
headlines.summary: Trump already asked the Supreme Court to reconsider denying him an appeal of a verdict holding him liable for sexually abusing and defaming E. Jean Carroll.

headlines.title: Fed officials were split on direction of interest rates at last meeting, minutes show
headlines.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released minutes from its June 16-17 meeting.

headlines.title: Judge orders E. Jean Carroll be paid $5 million in damages from Trump verdict
headlines.summary: Trump was held civilly liable in two trials for defaming E. Jean Carroll when he denied her claim he sexually abused her in a New York department store.

headlines.title: Michael Burry bets on sportsbooks DraftKings and Flutter, sees prediction markets curbed by regulation
headlines.summary: The investor believes regulators will eventually crack down on prediction markets after competition from the upstarts pressured the stocks of sportsbooks.

headlines.title: Iran conflict flare-up awakens bears in airline stocks, but there's one big catch
headlines.summary: The U.S. Global Jets ETF is down 4% Wednesday, extending a two-day decline after challenging all-time highs last week.

headlines.title: Rivian tailspin hasn't shaken one trader's resolve
headlines.summary: Mike Khouw revisits his Rivian trade after the stock tanks on a share offering.

headlines.title: Kalshi traders see slim odds U.S. government will take a stake in OpenAI this year
headlines.summary: Traders on the prediction markets platform see a less than 30% likelihood the federal government will take a stake in AI companies Anthropic and OpenAI.

headlines.title: Buy these quality, low-stress stocks for the summer, says Jefferies
headlines.summary: This summer, Jefferies recommends focusing on some high-quality stocks that have been left behind by the AI momentum trade.

headlines.title: Here's how SpaceX's Nasdaq-100 inclusion might affect options pricing
headlines.summary: About half-a-million SpaceX options traded by midday Monday, a little below the average since inception.

headlines.title: I started retirement with $3 million. Now I’m 89 and down to $2 million. What if I get sick?
headlines.summary: Even if you’re not worried about your normal spending anymore, a long-term-care need is still a problem for any budget.

headlines.title: Did you mess up on your taxes? The IRS just made it easier to avoid paying a penalty.
headlines.summary: It’s a ‘major taxpayer win,’ according to one advocate inside the IRS

headlines.title: Oil prices extend gains after hours as U.S. forces conduct additional strikes on Iran
headlines.summary: Oil prices settled at their highest levels in more than two weeks on Wednesday, then extended their gains in after-hours trading after the U.S. military said it launched additional strikes on Iran.

headlines.title: Investors haven’t been this bullish on the dollar in a decade. How the buck can keep climbing.
headlines.summary: A crowded bet on a stronger U.S. dollar may depend on whether Wednesday’s jump in oil prices proves lasting, as renewed Middle East tensions revive inflation concerns and bolster expectations that the Federal Reserve may need to keep policy tight.

headlines.title: This chart shows stamp prices over the years as USPS hikes postage again this weekend
headlines.summary: The new rate will go into effect on July 12, and will be the eighth price increase over the last five calendar years

headlines.title: The Strait of Hormuz is back under ‘full-conflict conditions’ — and energy markets are scrambling
headlines.summary: Oil prices surge as U.S. and Iran trade strikes; but even without further disruption, volatility appears here to stay for energy markets

candidates.thesis: Leading semiconductor company with strong exposure to AI and compute infrastructure. Benefiting from secular growth in data center and gaming markets. Trading near SMA50 with healthy RSI level, offering a solid entry point.

World's largest semiconductor foundry, critical supplier for AI and advanced computing chips. Strong fundamentals and trading near SMA50 with a reasonable RSI level. Benefiting from secular growth in chip demand.

Dominant supplier of lithography equipment for semiconductor manufacturing, including EUV technology critical for advanced chips. Positioned to benefit from global chip demand growth. Trading near SMA50 with healthy RSI.

Leader in cybersecurity solutions with strong growth in subscription-based revenue and expanding market share. Benefiting from increasing demand for cybersecurity in a digital-first world. RSI is elevated but still below 70, with strong technicals.

Emerging leader in small modular reactors and clean energy solutions. Positioned to benefit from global energy transition trends. Trading near SMA50 with a healthy RSI level, offering a favorable entry point.
